2026-04-09IRCCImmigration and Refugee Protection ActReappointment of a part-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Ottawa District Office)Reappointment of Nicole Ladouceur of Gatineau, Quebec, as a part-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Ottawa District Office), to hold office during good behaviour for a term of five years, effective April 30, 2026.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a part-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Ottawa District Office)
precis: Reappointment of Nicole Ladouceur of Gatineau, Quebec, as a part-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Ottawa District Office), to hold office during good behaviour for a term of five years, effective April 30, 2026.
